Patch Set 8: Code-Review+1

Patch looks good. We've been slowly migrating lfs and lctl sub-commands to their own lfs-XXX.1 and lctl-YYY.8 man pages, so that they can be read more easily instead of having to scan through a huge single man page, and they can have a proper SYNOPSIS, OPTIONS, and EXAMPLES section.  

That isn't required for this patch to land, but something to keep in mind when making larger changes to the lfs.1 or lctl.8 files.

parents.subject: LU-16044 osd: discard pagecache in truncate's declaration

commit.subject: LU-16076 utils: enhance 'lfs check' command
commit.message:
LU-16076 utils: enhance 'lfs check' command

Add optional argument to 'lfs check' command so that only the
servers related to the specified lustre file system is checked.

Signed-off-by: Lei Feng <flei@whamcloud.com>
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanityn env=ONLY=113
Change-Id: I826a8e822af0a290f06ffaadadf1bb7f86899d99
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/48155
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Emoly Liu <emoly@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
